sentences.arabic: الصَّقَارَةُ فَنٌّ قَدِيمٌ يَعْتَمِدُ عَلَى تَدْرِيبِ الصُّقُورِ لِلصَّيْدِ.
sentences.translation: Sokolstvo je stara vještina zasnovana na dresuri sokola za lov.
sentences.translationEn: Falconry is an ancient art based on training falcons to hunt.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْبَدْوُ يَسْتَخْدِمُونَ الصُّقُورَ لِلْحُصُولِ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ فِي الصَّحْرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Beduini su koristili sokolove da bi nabavili hranu u pustinji.
sentences.translationEn: Bedouins used falcons to obtain food in the desert.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَنِي الصَّقَّارُ بِطَيْرِهِ عِنَايَةً كَبِيرَةً وَيُعَلِّمُهُ كَيْفَ يَصِيدُ.
sentences.translation: Sokolar pažljivo brine o svojoj ptici i uči je kako da lovi.
sentences.translationEn: The falconer takes great care of his bird and teaches it how to hunt.

sentences.arabic: سُجِّلَتِ الصَّقَارَةُ فِي قَائِمَةِ التُّرَاثِ الْإِنْسَانِيِّ لِمُنَظَّمَةِ الْيُونِسْكُو.
sentences.translation: Sokolstvo je uvršteno na listu nematerijalne kulturne baštine UNESCO-a.
sentences.translationEn: Falconry has been inscribed on UNESCO's Intangible Cultural Heritage list.
